medialive.channel.hdr10settings.CfnAbout:
Hdr10 Settings

The parents of this entity are H265ColorSpaceSettings (for color space settings in the output) and VideoSelectorColorSpaceSettings (for color space settings in the input).

medialive.channel.hdr10settings.MaxCll.Description: Maximum Content Light Level An integer metadata value defining the maximum light level, in nits, of any single pixel within an encoded HDR video stream or file.

medialive.channel.hdr10settings.MaxFall.Description: Maximum Frame Average Light Level An integer metadata value defining the maximum average light level, in nits, for any single frame within an encoded HDR video stream or file.
